description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features large glass windows, multiple balconies with glass railings, and a rooftop garden area. The house is set on a rectangular lot with a driveway, a carport, and a wooden deck that includes an outdoor pool and seating area. Several trees and landscaped elements are present around the property, enhancing its urban residential appeal. The main entrance is accessible via a set of steps and is partially sheltered by an overhang. The overall color palette is neutral, with shades of gray, white, and natural wood tones.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, balconies, a rooftop garden, and a wooden deck with a pool, set in a landscaped urban lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, large windows, and central tree with a clear view of the driveway and front landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the outdoor pool, wooden deck, and rear balconies, with visible stairs leading to the upper level.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional balconies, rooftop garden, and more of the wooden deck area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, outdoor seating, and the arrangement of windows and balconies on the side of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass balcony railings
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a flat overhang, and a large glass door, partially sheltered and integrated with the front landscaping.
